zh.Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Fraser於大約1286年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，她的父親Sir Simon Fraser Filius22歲，母親Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness25歲。她於1310年與Sir Patrick Fleming在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1312年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞享年27歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾比格亞。

zh-hans.Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland: 苏格兰藍納可爾比格亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Fraser于大约1286年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾时，她的父亲Sir Simon Fraser Filius22岁，母亲Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness25岁。她于1310年与Sir Patrick Fleming在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1312年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾比格亞享年27岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾比格亞。

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frasier

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Fraser was born about 1286, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Simon Fraser Filius, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness, was 25. She married Sir Patrick Fleming in 1310, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1312, in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Fraser est née environ 1286, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Simon Fraser Filius, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Patrick Fleming en 1310, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1312, à Biggar, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Biggar, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Fraser um 1286 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Simon Fraser Filius 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness 25. Sie hat 1310 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Sir Patrick Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1312 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Fraser è nata il circa 1286 nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Simon Fraser Filius, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Patrick Fleming nel 1310, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1312, nel Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Fraserが約1286年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Fraser Filiusは22歳，母Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithnessは25歳であった。1310年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでSir Patrick Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1312年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアビグガーで27歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアビグガーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Fraser(이)가 대략 1286년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Simon Fraser Filius(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1310년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Sir Patrick Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 비가에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 비가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Fraser nasceu aproximadamente 1286, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Simon Fraser Filius, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Patrick Fleming em 1310, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1312, em Biggar, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Fraser родилась около 1286 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Simon Fraser Filius было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Patrick Fleming в 1310 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1312 г. в местности бигар, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности бигар, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Fraser nació aproximadamente 1286, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Simon Fraser Filius, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Jarl Jónsdottir of Orkney - one of the heiresses of the earldom of Caithness, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Patrick Fleming en 1310, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1312, en Biggar, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Biggar, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
